full_text:
Tang Gu (Zizheng) 唐固 (子正)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tang Gu (唐固), styledZizheng (子正), was born in Danyang commandery. Well-educated, he knew various historical classics. Tang Gu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
